meaning: adj.无法投递的,无法送达的
examples: The E-mail you sent yesterday was returned as undeliverable.
Message undeliverable. Make sure the SMS address was entered correctly and try again.
Thee e-mail you sent yesterday was returned as undeliverable. Maybe you should check the address.
The service will retain liability for all undeliverable items until they are received by the addressee.
The IRS now says it is reconsidering what new procedures are needed for dealing with undeliverable notices.
